microsite.title: India · Software Engineers → Canada — 2026-05-01
microsite.description: India · Software Engineers → Canada · 7 composed widgets

props.headline: Your Path to Canada Starts Here
props.subhead: As Anjali Sharma from Bengaluru knows, CELPIP is recognised by IRCC for Express Entry, helping you boost your CRS score with confidence.
props.imageAlt: A diverse group of software engineers preparing for the CELPIP test.
Anjali Sharma celebrating her CELPIP success in Toronto
props.oneLineMoment: Anjali Sharma celebrates her CELPIP success in Toronto after months of hard work.
props.paragraphQuote: I felt so relieved when I received my CELPIP results. I had been studying for weeks, and I knew that my CLB 9 score would help boost my CRS points. The computer-based format made it easy to take the test, and I appreciated how quickly I got my results. CELPIP truly supported my journey to Canada.

features.title: Recognised by IRCC
features.desc: CELPIP is recognised by IRCC for Express Entry, helping Anjali Sharma move closer to her Canadian dream.

features.title: Four Skills Assessed
features.desc: The test evaluates listening, reading, writing, and speaking, ensuring a comprehensive language assessment for Anjali Sharma.

features.title: Computer-Based Testing
features.desc: Enjoy a fully computer-based testing experience, designed for tech-savvy engineers like Anjali Sharma.

pillars.title: Recognised by IRCC
pillars.desc: CELPIP is officially recognised by IRCC for Express Entry, making it a trusted choice for your pathway to Canada.

pillars.title: Computer-Based Testing
pillars.desc: Enjoy a fully computer-based testing experience with CELPIP. It's designed to fit your tech-savvy skills as a software engineer.

pillars.title: Quick Results
pillars.desc: Receive your results in just 5 to 7 days. This speed helps Anjali Sharma and others like her to keep moving forward in their journey.

props.heading: Book Your CELPIP Test Today
props.subheading: Anjali Sharma is ready to take the next step to Canada! Are you?

faqs.a: CELPIP is a Canadian English language test recognised by IRCC for Express Entry. It assesses your listening, reading, writing, and speaking skills.

faqs.q: How does CELPIP help improve my CRS score?
faqs.a: By achieving a high score in CELPIP, like Anjali Sharma with CLB 9, you can enhance your Comprehensive Ranking System (CRS) score, improving your chances for Express Entry.

faqs.q: What can I expect in the CELPIP test?
faqs.a: The CELPIP test offers a fully computer-based experience, ensuring a smooth assessment of your language skills.

faqs.q: How long does it take to receive my results?
faqs.a: Results are available in just 5 to 7 days, allowing you to plan your next steps quickly.
